# reflector output contract vs cataforge doctor / docs validate disagree on SKILL-IMPROVE front matter

## Summary

reflector AGENT.md §Output Contract says SKILL-IMPROVE-{skill_id}.md and RETRO files have 'no YAML front matter, indexer auto-skips', but cataforge docs validate / cataforge doctor flag them as orphan FAIL until front matter is added. Either update reflector AGENT.md to require minimal front matter on its outputs, or have the indexer/doctor honor the documented exception. Discovered this discrepancy when backfilling 6 SKILL-IMPROVE files from a deferred RETRO.

## Environment

- **CataForge package**: `0.3.1`
- **Scaffold version**: `0.3.1`
- **Python**: `3.11.4`
- **Platform**: `Windows-10-10.0.26100-SP0`
- **Runtime platform**: `claude-code`

## Proposal

Affected files: docs/reviews/retro/SKILL-IMPROVE-*.md. Reflector AGENT.md (.cataforge/agents/reflector/AGENT.md §Output Contract, line ~38) explicitly states the indexer auto-skips. Doctor scaffolding however lists every SKILL-IMPROVE file as 'orphan FAIL'. Suggested fix: make the contract explicit either way and align both implementations.
